name: Ladders & WHAT?!
description: A standard board with ladders and whats.

name: Run Away from WHAT?!
description: Run away from the destructive objects or you die!

name: Guess WHAT?!
description: Keep moving or land on a question mark to answer a question. A boost awaits...if answered correctly.

name: Let's escape from WHAT?!
description: Team up with other players to find the keys to the exit and escape! While dealing with different entities.

name: Clash with WHAT?!
description: Turn-based Battle Royale! Gather weapons and be the last man standing.
